GET /health.name: health
GET /health.description: Returns the current health status of the VSS service. Use this to verify that the backend is running and reachable before issuing other requests.

GET /app/features.name: app_features
GET /app/features.description: Returns the set of features enabled in the running VSS deployment (e.g. search, summary). Use this to determine which capabilities are available before calling feature-specific tools.

GET /tags.name: get_tags
GET /tags.description: List all tags that have been applied to videos in the VSS library. Tags are short labels (e.g. 'outdoor', 'interview') used to categorise and filter videos.

DELETE /tags/{tagId}.name: delete_tag
DELETE /tags/{tagId}.description: Permanently delete a tag by its ID. The tag is removed from the system and detached from any videos it was associated with. This action cannot be undone.

GET /videos.name: get_all_videos
GET /videos.description: List all videos ingested into the VSS library. Returns a JSON array of video records, each containing the video ID, file name, upload timestamp, duration, associated tags, and storage metadata. Use this to discover available videos before running a search or requesting embeddings.

GET /videos/{videoId}.name: get_video
GET /videos/{videoId}.description: Retrieve detailed metadata for a single video identified by its ID. Returns file name, upload timestamp, duration, processing status, associated tags, and any generated embedding information.

POST /videos/search-embeddings/{videoId}.name: create_video_search_embeddings
POST /videos/search-embeddings/{videoId}.description: Trigger the generation of semantic search embeddings for a specific video. Embeddings must exist before the video can be matched by natural-language search queries. Call this after uploading a new video or if a previous embedding run failed.

POST /search/query.name: run_search_query
POST /search/query.description: Execute an immediate, one-off natural-language search across all indexed videos. Provide a text query (e.g. 'person wearing a red jacket near a car') and receive a ranked list of matching video segments with timestamps and relevance scores.
